milestones.title: Docs Alignment
milestones.summary: Establish the V3 archetype design as the authoritative project direction. Archive superseded V2 design and legacy XML‑builder docs.

milestones.title: Archetype Framework Skeleton
milestones.summary: Add the framework before adding real integration patterns: base classes, registry discovery, parameter schemas, and the first three MCP authoring tools.

items.title: M1.1 Archetype and primitive base contracts
M1.5 Tests for framework and tools

milestones.title: First Vertical Slice — database_to_api_sync
milestones.summary: End‑to‑end archetype for scheduled DB extraction into a REST API target. Includes DB & REST builders, profiles/maps, transform escalation ladder, process orchestration and operational primitives (retry, DLQ, watermarks, run metadata).

items.title: M2.4 REST target builder for sync sends
M2.6 Direct profile/map and XML↔JSON conversion
M2.1a Amend contract for typed transformations
M2.8 Target and operational reliability primitives
M2.10 End‑to‑end validation and live QA
M2.x DB connector variants (Custom, pooling, auth)

milestones.title: Deploy & Test Orchestration
milestones.summary: One‑call deploy/test path: package, deploy, attach runtime, schedule, execute, monitor. Idempotent retries; structured failure diagnostics.

milestones.title: Agent Ergonomics
milestones.summary: Make the authoring flow self‑discoverable for a cold LLM client: structured error taxonomy, workflow hints in list_capabilities, schema access for IntegrationSpecV1 and each archetype, anti‑template labeled examples.

milestones.title: API Variants
milestones.summary: Broaden from DB‑to‑REST into the main scheduled sync cases: api_to_database_sync, api_to_api_sync, REST pagination, OData fetch, SOAP source/target where required.

items.title: M5.x Database Send / write operation + write profile

milestones.title: Event & Listener Variants
milestones.summary: Event‑based integrations after scheduled syncs are stable: HTTP listener source primitive, listener archetypes (HTTP→DB, HTTP→REST), inbound validation, listener deploy/start/verify.

milestones.title: Discovery Tools
milestones.summary: Read‑only discovery: OpenAPI, SOAP WSDL, OData metadata, DB schema, profile field inference, plus import_existing_integration for migration drafts to IntegrationSpecV1.

milestones.title: Archetype Composition
milestones.summary: Compose stable standalone archetypes into larger integrations with contract validation between parts. Composed output deploys and tests through normal orchestration.
